creator: michipili@gmail.com
text:
I am working on a port for OCaml 4.02.1. The port itself is ready, but I
still need to work on labltk, which is now distributed separately.

I think it is best to submit patches for the new OCaml and LablTK ports
simultaneously, to favour a smooth upgrade path.  If someone cannot wait,
he can find my work here:

  https://github.com/michipili/ports-bsd/tree/ocaml-4.02.1

(This branch is susceptible to be rebased to follow the ports tree.)
